inputs.label: Base length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the base of the parallelogram.

inputs.label: Side length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the adjacent side. Used if base and height not provided.

inputs.label: Angle between base and side
inputs.businessContext: Angle between base and side. Used for alternative area calculation.

inputs.label: Angle between diagonals
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the diagonals. Used for alternative area calculation.

formulas.area: (base > 0 && height > 0) ? (base * height) : ((base > 0 && side > 0 && angle > 0) ? (base * side * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) : ((diagonal1 > 0 && diagonal2 > 0 && angleDiagonals > 0) ? (0.5 * diagonal1 * diagonal2 * Math.sin(angleDiagonals * Math.PI / 180)) : 0))

breakdown: If base and height provided: area = base × height.
If base, side, and angle provided: area = base × side × sin(angle).
If diagonals and angle between diagonals provided: area = 0.5 × diagonal1 × diagonal2 × sin(angle).
